programs.title: James Hemings: Ghost in America’s Kitchen
programs.desc: The erasure of America’s first master chef, James Hemings, is uncovered.

programs.title: Ghost Nets
programs.desc: A dive crew searches the Gulf Islands to remove abandoned nets and protect the ocean.

programs.title: Moonless Oasis
programs.desc: In Canada, citizen scientists risk everything to protect prehistoric glass sponge reefs once thought extinct.

programs.title: Seals of Sable
programs.desc: On Sable Island, grey seals birth 80,000 pups as researchers study their elusive deep-ocean habit.

programs.title: Trees of Life
programs.desc: A two-year journey in Canada’s Gaspé forests revealing the bonds between animals and the trees they rely on.

programs.title: The Pursuit of Endurance: On the Shoulders of Shackleton
programs.desc: Nine adventurers retrace Shackleton’s path, exploring sub-Antarctic islands by boat and ski.
